headline: KKR to Present at the Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference
summary: NEW YORK, May 29, 2026--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) announced today that Raj Agrawal, Partner and Global Head of Real Assets, will present at the Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference on Wednesday, June 10, 2026 at 8:15 AM ET.
